mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(SUM(M.TON), 0) TON FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST M INNER JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM N ON M.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = N.ID WHERE M.TYPE = '1'
AND N.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME = #{cargoCategoryName}
AND N.WORK_START_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND TO_DATE(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= N.WORK_END_TIME

SELECT * FROM T_DIS_SHIP_DYNAMIC M INNER JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM N ON M.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = N.ID
N.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME = #{cargoCategoryName}
AND N.WORK_START_TIME >= TO_DATE(#{startTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
AND TO_DATE(#{endTime}, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= N.WORK_END_TIME
